title: CT10.N02 completed discharge record — Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT10.N02, the recovery node “Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17” of tactic CT10 (Default refinement). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT10.N02. It must be exactly `CT10`, selecting Default refinement (refinement) as the tactic that owns the recovery step “Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17”. It must be exactly `CT10.N02` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT10.N02 within tactic CT10 (Default refinement). It must be exactly 2, matching the N02 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT10.N02. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the recovery obligation “Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT10.N02. The array must contain `S-Def`, `S-Rout`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Def` to occur in CT10.N02's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that constructs a typed object deterministically from recorded branch-state data for the obligation “Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17”.

Requires `S-Rout` to occur in CT10.N02's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that packages a typed payload and verifies its unique producer-to-consumer route for the obligation “Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT10.N02 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Def (subject, sourceStateFields, constructor, parameters, evidence); S-Rout (payloadId, producerTacticId, consumerTacticId, tupleEntries, vocabularyVerified, uniqueConsumerVerified, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Def` evidence instance at CT10.N02. It must be exactly `S-Def`, identifying the contract that constructs a typed object deterministically from recorded branch-state data; the same instance must supply subject, sourceStateFields, constructor, parameters, evidence.

Contract discriminator for a `S-Rout` evidence instance at CT10.N02. It must be exactly `S-Rout`, identifying the contract that packages a typed payload and verifies its unique producer-to-consumer route; the same instance must supply payloadId, producerTacticId, consumerTacticId, tupleEntries, vocabularyVerified, uniqueConsumerVerified, evidence.

statement.informal: Construct or verify: Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17
statement.latex: \textbf{Recovery entry}\\payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
